name: mr_qwen3tts
description: Qwen3-TTS streaming TTS plugin via vllm-omni HTTP API - drop-in replacement for mr_eleven_stream
author: MindRoot

MR_QWEN3TTS_API_URL.description: Base URL for vllm-omni TTS server (port 8091)

MR_QWEN3TTS_VOICE.description: Predefined voice name (vivian, ryan, aiden, dylan, eric, ono_anna, serena, sohee, uncle_fu)

MR_QWEN3TTS_LANGUAGE.description: Language for TTS (Auto, English, Chinese, Japanese, Korean, etc.)
